assumption: Resource can be represented as one aggregate stock
review_action: Add spatial sub-stocks for applied use

risk_if_wrong: Recovery may be overestimated or underestimated

assumption: Demand grows exponentially within each scenario
risk_if_wrong: Real demand may shift due to price policy substitution or shocks
review_action: Test demand sensitivity and sector-specific demand

risk_if_wrong: Policy response may be delayed weak contested or inequitable
review_action: Represent implementation delay and governance capacity

assumption: Extraction is limited by demand and available stock
risk_if_wrong: Technology may sustain high extraction deeper into depletion
review_action: Test extraction efficiency and rebound scenarios

assumption: Critical threshold is twenty percent of carrying capacity
risk_if_wrong: Real collapse threshold may be unknown nonlinear or context-specific

assumption: No equity or livelihood distribution is modeled
risk_if_wrong: Policy interpretation may hide unequal burden
review_action: Add stakeholder groups and distributional metrics
